Spring Data Core
  1. org.springframework.data.repository.cdi

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.repository.cdi

Packages that use org.springframework.data.repository.cdi
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.repository.cdi
Base classes to implement CDI support for repositories.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.repository.cdi used by org.springframework.data.repository.cdi
    Class
    Description
    CdiRepositoryBean
    Base class for Bean wrappers.
    CdiRepositoryConfiguration
    Interface containing the configurable options for the Spring Data repository subsystem using CDI.
    CdiRepositoryContext
    Context for CDI repositories.
